economic_notes: Nation has 13 government business enterprises including energy, safety services, contracting, well services, gaming, marketplace, utilities, land development, and communications. COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant uncertainty. O'Chiese Settlement Trust excluded from financial statements per Note 18.
notes: Long-term debt of $38,305,345 includes both the CMHC/TD mortgage debt ($18,285,299) and the FNFA promissory note ($20,020,046). Federal trust funds of $24,840,461 held by Government of Canada not included in cash. O'Chiese Settlement Trust excluded from consolidation per Note 18. 13 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with combined net loss of $2,486,562 in 2020 vs net income of $2,114,401 in 2019. COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant uncertainty at year end. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($11,674,641) + CMHC subsidy ($144,566) + HRD funds ($449,403) + First Nations Development Fund ($402,250) = $12,670,860; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. No remuneration schedule included in the provided financial statements.
